scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tighter text-slate-900
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900

layout.dashboard: Bento Grid Protocol (Mode B): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6
layout.marketing: Asymmetric Swiss Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12

components.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A2540] hover:bg-[#051A2E] text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.success: bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-slate-200 bg-transparent hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors

components.sidebar: w-64 bg-[#F8F9FA] border-r border-slate-200 h-screen fixed left-0 top-0
components.header: h-16 border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl sticky top-0 z-50
components.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-slate-900 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0A2540]/20 focus:border-[#0A2540] transition-all

badge.demo: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badge.real: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

interactions_and_motion.hover: All interactive elements must change state on hover. Buttons darken, cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1).
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-out' globally for standard UI changes.
interactions_and_motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up for dashboard widgets and list items.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against backgrounds meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio (APCA guidelines).
accessibility.testing: MUST include 'data-testid' on all interactive and key informational elements (buttons, inputs, toggles, balances, charts).

hero_background.description: Abstract clean fintech 3D shapes in navy and mint, perfect for landing page hero background (use with opacity/overlay to maintain text contrast).

trading_illustration.description: Minimalist 3D isometric financial trading chart trending upward. Use in onboarding or Learn center.

onboarding_texture.description: Soft gradient background for auth pages or onboarding wizard.

specific_instructions_to_main_agent.demo_real_toggle: Create a highly visible, pill-shaped toggle switch in the main header or top of the sidebar. In Demo mode, show a subtle gray/blue 'Practice' badge. In Real mode, switch accent to soft green 'Live' badge and update dashboard CTAs to point to broker redirect links instead of internal simulator actions.
specific_instructions_to_main_agent.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn charts. Ensure lines and areas use the primary navy or accent green colors. No grid lines on the X/Y axes to maintain the clean Stripe-like look.
specific_instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: MUST use standard .js extensions (NO TSX). Use standard HTML elements formatted with Tailwind classes for layout structures. For complex interactive elements like the mode toggle or modal popups, use customized Shadcn UI components.
specific_instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use lucide-react (default) with thin stroke-width (1.5) to keep the minimal aesthetic.
specific_instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements and key text MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='mode-toggle-switch').
